scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && cp index.html dist/index.html && mkdir -p assets icons && cp dist/assets/index.js assets/index.js && cp dist/assets/index.css assets/index.css && cp public/manifest.webmanifest manifest.webmanifest && cp public/icons/icon-192.svg icons/icon-192.svg && cp public/icons/icon-512.svg icons/icon-512.svg && cp public/_redirects _redirects && cp public/_headers _headers
